en: Shuni, are you home?
Yes, come on in.
Shuni, are you home?

ab: uka Shuni itaun! Apin iaku, numa sa akalawan uhu, ya mushuqishiza Shuni afuilh iaku thithu.
ch: B:Shuni不在家耶!我是Apin，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Shuni。
en: Shuni is not at home. I am Apin. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.
Who are you?

ab: apuki’ay, Apin mat Shuni iamin, tanaiwan uhu s pitaw.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Apin和 Shuni， 幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Apin and Shuni, please open the door for us.
Who is it?

ab: Hudun iaku, amakilhim iaku sa Qabus.
en: I am Hudun, I am here for Qabus.
Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: mataniza ihu antu munai, mathuaw iaku mangqtu ihun.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.
Apin, I am here to play with you.

ab: iahiaw mutaun mindaaq iaku mitalha ihun.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: haya sa naak a pinalhuiza wa buna, kaanuan uhu.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!
The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: unaiwan! haya sa naak a pinalhuiza wa ribush a bunlhaz, kaanuan uhu.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: haya wa ribush a bunlhaz mathuaw madahun.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: ilhungquan! haya sa naak a pinalhuiza wa antu kumahin a tipur, kaanuan uhu!
ch: A:請坐! 這是我種的有機玉米，吃看看！
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.
Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.
Do you want some oranges?

ab: ani iaku tu kmaan sa rithkuy, amakaan iaku sa fizfiz.
ch: B:我不要吃橘子，我要吃香蕉。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some bananas instead.
Would you want some cookies?
Sure, I like it very much.

ab: amalalas iaku ribush a bunlhaz pakaan ihun.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: anuniza, haya wa ribush a bunlhaz qalha shnir.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.
I will bring you some water.
Thank you.

ab: ararawan kmaan, manasha pania’an iaku pinitata.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: uau! dadu mathuaw makanshuz maqitan kaanin.
ch: B:嗚! 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.
Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.
I’ll make myself at home then.
Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: mathuaw iaku makinaan, ani iaku tu muqtha kmaan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
